lineageDisclosure.repeatsNote: Exact fixture repeats carried forward from v1 (multi-angle review of the same papers: accepted vs blocked vs uncertain) remain JUSTIFIED and unchanged. No new repeats were introduced by the v4 additions.
lineageDisclosure.syntheticExclusionRule: Synthetic technical controls (SYN-*) are denominator-eligible (reviewEligibility: substantive) ONLY when an independent expected-truth source (test-harness design, not the probe's own rendered output) is documented in SYNTHETIC_EXPECTED_TRUTH. Any synthetic without documented independent truth is marked INSUFFICIENT_SOURCE_CONTEXT and excluded. All 13 v1 synthetics have documented independent expected truth in v4.
lineageDisclosure.v4MembershipPolicy: v4 CARRIES FORWARD the same 33 v1 goldIds/fixtures (unchanged membership, for lineage) AND ADDS 10 new gold-manual packets (GOLD-11-034..043) previously unused across v1–v3, giving a NEW sample not identical to v3. v1, v2 and v3 artefacts preserved read-only.

rootCausesFixed: resolveGateOffenceFamily + auditFamily preference used for every offence_family surface and passed into every gateSolicitorOutput call (ESA / gold-manual / synthetic) — removes matter-level resolved-vs-unresolved contradictions.
hasMatterFamilyResolvedUnresolvedContradiction cross-surface contract run per case across the whole v4 corpus — zero hits required.
Controlled source context surface with INSUFFICIENT_SOURCE_CONTEXT exclusion from substantive FP/FN; synthetics now carry independent expected-truth context and count as substantive.
Every packet's source context discloses a 'Controlled evidence reference' line (not free-copy; excluded from the leak scan by design) without echoing the primary judged output.
Fixture IDs / internal strings stripped from solicitor-visible copy.
Theft Act / MG6C formulas queued (not free copy) on header and court lines.
Client summary prose sanitized (redacted papers / unsafe proof-outcome wording / foundation SJP / First appearance / fraud hero / Further papers on the file).
Chase labels deduped and sanitized for solicitor display (Chase Total = deduped label count).
Blocked copy previews proportionate (Item/Status/Reason) via ruleIds and inferBlockedItemLabel.
